# Update versionCode and build marker
python3 << 'PY'
import re
from datetime import datetime, timezone

with open('app.config.ts', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Bump versionCode 3 -> 4
content = re.sub(r"versionCode: 3", "versionCode: 4", content)

# Update build marker
content = re.sub(
    r"buildMarker: 'IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_13_ICON_UPDATE'",
    "buildMarker: 'IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_13_LOGO_FINAL'",
    content
)

# Update buildTimestamp
now = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()
content = re.sub(
    r"buildTimestamp: '[0-9T:.+-]+'",
    f"buildTimestamp: '{now}'",
    content
)

# Update source commit
import subprocess
sha = subprocess.check_output(['git', 'log', '--oneline', '-1']).decode().strip().split()[0]
content = re.sub(
    r"sourceCommitSha: '[a-f0-9]+'",
    f"sourceCommitSha: '{sha}'",
    content
)

with open('app.config.ts', 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)

print(f'Updated: versionCode 4, timestamp {now}, sha {sha}')

if [ "$1" = "get-sockname" ]; then
    echo '{"version":"2024.05.06.00","sockname":"/tmp/fake-watchman.sock"}'
    exit 0
elif [ "$1" = "watch-project" ]; then
    echo '{"version":"2024.05.06.00","watch":"/tmp/fake-watch","watcher":"inotify"}'
    exit 0
elif [ "$1" = "version" ] || [ "$1" = "--version" ]; then
    echo '2024.05.06.00'
    exit 0
else
    echo '[]'
    exit 0
fi
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/fake-bin/watchman
echo "Created fake watchman"
/tmp/fake-bin/watchman --version
/tmp/fake-bin/watchman get-sockname
/tmp/fake-bin/watchman watch-project"}
